subject: (no subject)
body:
I hope this finds you well... When you said our
dealings were only one-way,, you were right,,, after
spending a considerable amount of time... reading your
ppm and then talking to both you and your partner...
giving it to the best investment lawyer in new york,
and sending you the comments.. I have yet to receive a
minimal "thank you"// IF our friendship isn't enough
for you to follow even the most basic courtesies, I
would have hoped that by now ,, your understanding of
business , would require some minimal diligence.,,, I
am very disturbed by the gangrenous nature of both. 

__________________________________________________
Do You Yahoo!?
Tired of spam?  Yahoo! Mail has the best spam protection around 
http://mail.yahoo.com
